UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile data including location, crops, and farm details.

location.description: Location of the farm (e.g., 'Chennai, Tamil Nadu').

crops.description: Primary crops grown by the farmer.

farmUnit.description: Unit of measurement for the farm size.

soilType.description: Type of soil on the farm.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last profile update.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile documents stored by user ID.
